description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a large, rectangular metallic head with slightly rounded edges and visible rivets along the sides, suggesting reinforced construction. The head has a matte, slightly worn finish with subtle dents and scuff marks, indicating prior use. The handle is cylindrical, made of wood with a natural grain pattern, and appears sturdy and straight, providing a solid grip. The transition between the head and handle is reinforced with a metallic collar, enhancing durability. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty tasks such as demolition or construction. The color palette is dominated by silvery-gray metal and medium brown wood, giving it a classic, industrial appearance.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a large, riveted metal head and a straight wooden handle, showing signs of use and durability.
description_view_0: Front view shows the square face of the metal head and the cylindrical wooden handle directly beneath it.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the rectangular metal head, the riveted side plates, and the straight wooden handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite square face of the head and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other side of the head with rivets and the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with visible grain, cylindrical shape, and a smooth finish.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head with flat striking faces and riveted side plates for reinforcement.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible dents and scuff marks on the metal head, indicating prior use.
